title: VaultResultSchedulingCompatV1
description: Constant-shape output for SCHEDULING_COMPAT_V1 contract including diagnostic intermediates.

max_overlap_minutes.description: Largest same-day UTC overlap observed across all window pairs.

required_duration_minutes.description: Required duration computed as max(A.min_duration_minutes, B.min_duration_minutes).

location_compatible.description: True when location constraints are jointly satisfiable.

overlaps_by_day.description: Per-day maximum overlap in UTC minutes across all same-day window pairs.

max_overlap_check.description: Model self-check that max_overlap_minutes equals the maximum listed overlap.

x-vcav-prompt-instruction: Based on the scheduling data from two agents, determine whether their availability schedules are compatible.
x-vcav-prompt-output-format:
Respond with valid JSON using ONLY these values:
- scheduling_signal: "CLEAR_MATCH" | "PARTIAL_MATCH" | "NO_MATCH"
- constraint_type: "TIME_CONFLICT" | "LOCATION_CONFLICT" | "DURATION_CONFLICT" | "MULTI_CONSTRAINT" | "NONE"
- max_overlap_minutes: integer from 0 to 1440 (largest same-day UTC overlap in minutes)
- required_duration_minutes: integer from 1 to 240 (required meeting duration in minutes)
- location_compatible: true | false (whether location constraints are jointly satisfiable)
- overlaps_by_day: object with keys MON, TUE, WED, THU, FRI each an integer from 0 to 1440
- max_overlap_check: true | false (self-check that max_overlap_minutes equals the maximum listed overlap)
$comment: Entropy remains bounded by schema ranges and enums.
